summary: Iteration 15: Verified deep sanitization fix for corrupted localStorage chat payloads. All 4 test scenarios passed: (1) Malformed localStorage with messages=[null,'bad',{foo:'bar'}] does NOT crash /chat, (2) Error boundary NOT displayed when malformed state exists, (3) Chat top bar/tablist/input render correctly after recovery, (4) Standard login/register still navigates to /chat correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: normalizeSavedState() in ChatContext.js correctly filters out null and non-object message items (line 31-41)
safeMessages.filter(message => message && typeof message === 'object') handles null/string/primitive values
Each message field is individually sanitized with type checks and fallback defaults
Invalid selectedMessages, pausedModels, promptHistory arrays are also sanitized with type guards
loadFromStorage() gracefully handles JSON parse errors by returning null (line 13-19)
RouteErrorBoundary has reset button that clears localStorage and redirects to /chat

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All malformed localStorage scenarios recovered without crash

seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified the deep sanitization fix in ChatContext.js normalizeSavedState(). The app now gracefully handles corrupted localStorage payloads containing: null values in message arrays, string values instead of objects, objects missing required fields, wrong types for all state fields, invalid JSON strings, and null localStorage values. The RouteErrorBoundary is working but was NOT triggered during any test because normalizeSavedState successfully recovers the state.

malformed_localStorage_tests: TEST 2: All fields with wrong types - PASS (no error boundary)
TEST 3: Empty object {} - PASS (no error boundary)
TEST 4: Invalid JSON string - PASS (no error boundary)
TEST 5: null localStorage value - PASS (no error boundary)
ui_recovery_verification: Chat top bar rendered after malformed state - PASS
Model badges restored to defaults - PASS
regression_tests: Desktop: No error boundary after auth - PASS
Mobile: No error boundary on mobile - PASS

ChatContext.js_normalizeSavedState.line_30-41: safeMessages filters null/non-objects and maps with type-safe defaults
